end return(function(V,k,m,b,z,F,w,h,G,D,E,q,U,Y,g,e,o,i,s,S,v,n)G,o,v,n,s,E,S,U,i,e,D,q,g,Y,h=function(V,l)local k=E(l)local m=function(m,b,z,F,w)return S(V,{m,b;z,F,w},l,k)end return m
